title: gmelina asiatica var. villosa
intro: Gmelina asiatica var. villosa, also known as villosa gmelina, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gmelina asiatica var. villosa include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and also used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and ointments, to harness its medicinal benefits.
